Build Authority that Earns AI Mentions

Your digital footprint can make or break your chances of appearing in AI-generated answers. We shape your brand profile across verified sources so large language models have the signals they need to cite you. Because to LLMs, trust and consistency are everything.

Get Your Authority Audit

Search Rewards Keywords. AI Rewards Credible Brands.

You’ve optimized for Google. But to show up in AI answers, your brand needs a trail of proof across the web.

AI-driven platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity assemble answers from multiple sources across the web – directories, articles, expert content, and trusted data platforms. If your business isn’t consistently represented in those places, AI may not fully understand who you are or bring you into the responses your customers see.

Start Your Free Audit

Traditional SEO

  • Competes for keyword rankings
  • Focuses on on-page optimization
  • Measured by impressions and clicks

AI Brand Visibility

  • Competes on brand trust rather than keywords
  • Focuses on brand authority across the web
  • Measured by brand mentions, traffic from AI platforms

  • You’re Not in Trusted Data Sources

    You’re missing from key databases like Crunchbase, G2, or LinkedIn.

  • Your Brand Data Is Inconsistent Across the Web

    Your company info varies across directories, reducing AI trust.

  • You Have Authority Gaps (Few or No Mentions)

    Few credible sites or media mention your brand.

  • Your Content Isn’t Structured for AI Discovery

    Your pages lack expert, structured information AI can cite.

  • You’re Ignoring Reputation and Reviews

    Too few authentic reviews or ratings to validate credibility.

  • You’re Not Building Thought Leadership That Gets Cited

    You’re not publishing or quoted on authority platforms.

You’re Doing Everything Right-But AI Still Can’t See You

Even with solid SEO, content, and social media, your brand may never appear in AI-generated answers.

The Nowspeed GEO Business Authority Program

The Nowspeed GEO Business Authority Program is a proven framework that helps your company earn trust and visibility across the sources AI relies on. We audit your digital footprint, build consistent authority signals, publish credible content, and monitor your brand’s influence so you’re positioned to be recognized and cited by both people and AI.

Start Your Free Audit

1

Assess

Audit your visibility and authority footprint.

2

Unify

Create consistency around your brand.

3

Broadcast

Share your unified brand information across your official business platforms.

4

Amplify

Expand your presence on trusted databases, media platforms, and review channels.

5

Monitor

Track brand mentions and traffic from AI platforms.

FAQ: Nowspeed GEO Business Authority Service

How is GEO Business Authority different from traditional SEO or PR?

GEO Business Authority focuses on shaping how your brand is understood, trusted, and represented across the ecosystem that feeds both search engines and large language models (LLMs). SEO improves how pages rank. PR increases visibility and relationships. GEO Business Authority unifies these efforts by building the structured signals, profiles, content, and citations that help both humans and AI recognize your brand as a credible source.

What outcomes can we expect from the GEO Business Authority Service?

You can expect clearer, more consistent brand signals across key directories, platforms, and content sources; a stronger digital footprint; and improved visibility in places where audiences and algorithms look for authoritative information. While we don’t guarantee placement in any specific search or AI response, our approach is grounded in a proven track record of helping clients achieve meaningful gains in AI citations, LLM-driven traffic, and conversions.

How long does it take to see improvements in authority and visibility?

Many clients see measurable improvements within 60-90 days, with some experiencing early gains based on their starting authority footprint. The initial audit sets your benchmark, and consistent monthly work strengthens your authority signals. Because authority compounds over time, the largest gains typically emerge after several months of prioritized action.

What does the month-to-month process look like, and how involved does our team need to be?

Each month, we deliver a prioritized roadmap of the highest-impact steps for strengthening your authority. Your team may need to review profiles, approve content updates, or provide client logos, testimonials, or subject-matter expertise when needed. We handle the execution: directory submissions, structured data updates, outreach, profile optimization, FAQ development, and other authority-building work.

How do you measure Business Authority, and what reporting will we receive?

We measure impact by tracking when and how often large language models reference your brand – including mentions, citations, linked sources, and appearance in AI-generated answers. When available, we also monitor LLM-driven website traffic and assisted conversions to understand how these platforms influence customer behavior. Each month, you receive an executive summary with new authority signals earned and updated recommendations based on measurable results.

Start Your Free Audit

Want to know if AI can find your business?

We’ll run a free Authority Visibility Audit to show how often your company appears in trusted sources used by AI.
